name: open-youtube-transcript-copy
description: Unofficial open fork and provenance-tracked source extraction for YouTube Transcript Copy.

scripts.build:with-validate-manifest: npm run validate-manifest && npm run build:no-validate-manifest
scripts.sign:no-listing: npm run validate-manifest && web-ext sign --source-dir source/extension --artifacts-dir dist --channel unlisted
scripts.sign:with-listing: npm run validate-manifest && web-ext sign --source-dir source/extension --artifacts-dir dist --channel listed --amo-metadata .amo-metadata.json && npm run update-amo-description
